title: Azzenaj

{{Quote|It is I for whom you search. The seers of Singing Mountain have foretold it.|Azzenaj|<ref name="SWGTCG:SMA">{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|scenario=Singing Mountain Assault}}</ref>}}
'''Azzenaj''' was an Arch [[Witches of Dathomir|Witch]] of the [[Singing Mountain Clan]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Her pet [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] was named [[Lurrexu]].

==Biography==
She once sent out an individual to find her initiate who had gone to collect herbs and never came back. She pointed the individual towards the [[Nightspider Cult cave]].<ref name="SWG:AWA" />

At some point Azzenaj's old rival, the [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Nandina]], had escaped from the [[Chamber of Banishment]] and, hungering for revenge, decided to settle her score with the Arch Witch.<ref name="SWGTCG:NR">{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|scenario=Nightsister Roundup}}</ref> She hired an assassin to take care of Azzenaj and provided him with the proper instructions. The assassin made his move, and the Arch Witch met him with the full arsenal of her [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]]. However, the assassin possessed several lethal weapons,<ref name="SWGTCG:SMA" /> and Azzenaj used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to mask her life signs. The assassin, believing her dead,<ref name="SWGTCG:NR" /> took her elaborate jewelry as the proof of his job done and left to report to Nandina.<ref name="SWGTCG:SMA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Azzenaj was a [[Wikipedia:Non-player character|non-player character]] in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:AWA" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Arch Witch Azzenaj was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Publish 1 Notes: 13 August 03|Publish 1]]" update, released on [[August 3]], 2003.<ref name="P1">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=60888|text=Publish 1: Nightsisters Cave}}</ref> Upon the release of the revamped "[[W:c:swg:Witches of Dathomir Theme Park|Witches of Dathomir Theme Park]]," introduced in the [[W:c:swg:Game Update 19|Game Update 19]] on [[December 14]], [[2010]],<ref name="GU19">{{SonyForumsCite|url=swg/posts/list.m?topic_id=1160720|text=''Star Wars'' Galaxies: Game Update 19}}</ref> Azzenaj's original dialogues were removed from the game as the character was included in the new quest series.<ref name="SWG:Lost">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Lost|Dathomir}}</ref>
